bird.name: 美洲白颈鸦
bird.summary: 美洲白颈鸦（学名：Corvus leucognaphalus）是鸦科鸦属的一种，分布于波多黎各（已绝灭）、美国本土外小岛屿、多米尼加共和国和海地。全球活动范围约为8,300平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为易危。 美洲白颈鸦的栖息地包括亚热带或热带的湿润低地林和亚热带或热带的湿润…

relations.subject: 美洲白颈鸦
relations.evidence: It inhabits both lowland and mid-elevation mountain forest on Hispaniola, and somewhat tolerates degraded areas used for agriculture, as well as some urban landscapes
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 美洲白颈鸦
relations.evidence: It is endemic to the island of Hispaniola (split between Haiti and the Dominican Republic); it was formerly also extant on Puerto Rico and Saint Croix in the United States Virgin Islands, but has been extirpated from both islands due to considerable forest clearance and hunting for meat.{{Cite web |last=U.S
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
